brain_consensus.narrative: Fear has a stranglehold on the market as the Fear & Greed Index plunges to 28, mirroring the capitulation vibe of August 2024's bottom, while Bitcoin's 30-day momentum crumbles and a weakening DXY offers a faint, contrarian lifeline. This RISK_OFF purge is compressing sentiment to levels that historically precede violent snapbacks, yet the crowd remains frozen, waiting for the trapdoor to give way. The story is one of coiled exhaustion—where the last seller is being absorbed in the dark, setting the stage for a liquidity grab that punishes the late shorts.
brain_consensus.headline: Coiled in Fear's Shadow, Echoes of August

next_move.reasoning: Score sits at ~48 (Anxiety 39-46 band, but fear_greed 28 anchors lower; composite reads Anxiety/Complacency boundary). The 0% directional hit rate over 7 days on ±2+ point moves screams coil — my 8.3% direction accuracy and 4.5% transition accuracy confirm I've been forcing moves that don't exist. Divergences kill this: stablecoin_growth -14 (no new dry powder), mvrv_zscore -16 (no value compression), funding +17 (speculators already in), while etf_flows +45 and btc_dom_fade +25 are lagging risk-on signals in a risk-off tape. VIX 62 vs bottom's 38 with DXY firming means macro headwinds, not tailwinds. The 2024 August bottom analog is 79% similar but the leg is WRONG — that was recovery-from-bottom (Disbelief leg UP), this is chop-below-resistance (Anxiety leg uncertain). No breaker visible: need either stablecoin_growth >45 with funding <40 for UP, or VIX >75 with btc_momentum <35 for DOWN. Neither triggered.
next_move.confirmed_if: stablecoin_growth rises above 45 AND btc_momentum_30d holds above 48 — would signal accumulation phase shift to Disbelief leg UP
next_move.invalidated_if: VIX breaks 75 with funding sustaining above 55 AND btc_momentum_30d drops below 40 — would confirm Panic leg DOWN, or if etf_flows collapse below 70 while gold_strength pushes above 85, indicating flight-to-safety without crypto participation
